---
title: "Building ML Systems from First Principles"
subtitle: "Deep dives into tensors, transformers, inference engines, and agents - with real code, math, and benchmarks, not hand-waving."
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

::: {.grid .home-cards}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .home-card}
### 🧮 [Fundamentals](fundamentals.qmd)
Tensors, classical ML, training, architectures, and vision - the building blocks everything else stands on.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .home-card}
### ⚙️ [LLM Systems](llm-systems.qmd)
Inference, post-training, and scaling - how LLMs actually run and get better in production.
:::

:::
